sections.paragraph:
- Original: συμβαίνω

- Transliteration: Sumbaino

- Phonetic: soom-bah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to walk with the feet near together

2. to come together, meet with one

3. of things which fall out at the same time, to happen, turn out, come to pass

- Origin: from G4862 and the base of G939

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and the base of G939; to walk (figuratively transpire) together that is concur (take place): - be (-fall) happen (unto).
